Who I Am

About Me

I'm a Computer Engineering graduate from Jose Rizal Memorial State University, passionate about using technology and communication to make a meaningful impact. I thrive in fast-paced, team-driven environments and am committed to delivering quality work in every interaction.

Whether it's analyzing data, managing documents, or supporting clients, I bring a dedicated, quick-learning mindset and a genuine commitment to quality service. Known for actively listening, expressing ideas clearly, and building rapport with people from diverse backgrounds.
